HERO.TITLE_1: Discover local favorites with fast delivery

INTRO.SUBTITLE: VHan Delivery connects Korean diners with trusted restaurants across Vietnam.
INTRO.DESC_1: Order, track, and pay in just a few taps with our seamless experience.
INTRO.DESC_2: We help local partners engage Korean customers and drive sustainable revenue growth.

COST_CUT.TITLE: Optimize operating costs
COST_CUT.DESC: Lower fixed expenses with flexible service fees.

SETTLEMENT.TITLE: Same-day settlement (T+0)
SETTLEMENT.DESC: Receive payouts within the day to keep cash flow healthy.

FAST_DELIVERY.TITLE: Lightning-fast delivery
FAST_DELIVERY.DESC: Orders are dispatched immediately after customers confirm.

SUPPORT.TITLE: Dedicated partner support
SUPPORT.DESC: 24/7 assistance with training and operational guidance.

STEP1.TITLE: Register and verify account
STEP1.DESC: Enter your phone number, confirm the OTP, and create a free partner profile.

STEP2.TITLE: Flexible onboarding review
STEP2.DESC: Our specialists verify details and activate your store within 24 hours.

STEP3.TITLE: Launch and start delivering
STEP3.DESC: Configure your menu, accept the first order, and scale with VHan.

ITEM1.TITLE: Partner enrollment made simple
ITEM1.DESC: Step-by-step walkthrough to complete your profile and go live quickly.

ITEM2.TITLE: The go-to delivery app
ITEM2.DESC: Serving 63 provinces with more than 10,000 trusted local partners.

ITEM3.TITLE: New support center grand opening
ITEM3.DESC: Expanding resources to assist partners in major cities.

MERCHANT_SIGNUP.HERO_TITLE_1: Grow faster with a trusted delivery partner
MERCHANT_SIGNUP.HERO_TITLE_2: Register your store on VHan Delivery

MERCHANT_SIGNUP.BENEFIT_1_DESC: Showcase your dishes to thousands of Korean customers living and working in Vietnam.
MERCHANT_SIGNUP.BENEFIT_2_DESC: Digital registration, automatic order tracking, and same-day settlement keep operations smooth.
MERCHANT_SIGNUP.BENEFIT_3_DESC: Our support team helps optimize menus, marketing, and service quality around the clock.

FORM.STORE_NAME_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the official or trading name

MODAL.REGISTRATION_FAILED_DESC: We could not submit your information. Please try again or contact our support team.
MODAL.OTP_INVALID: The verification code is invalid or has expired. Request a new OTP and try again.
MODAL.REGISTRATION_SUCCESS_DESC: Thanks for registering! Our partner team will review your details and contact you within 24 hours.
